response.justification: Szabo is an excellent senior engineer with 20 years of experience and proven ability to build scalable systems handling millions of requests. However, this Principal role requires deep expertise in experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, and growth measurement systems—areas not evident in his career. While his technical fundamentals are solid and his current AI-focused role at re:cinq shows some alignment, the lack of specialized experience in A/B testing frameworks, statistical analysis, and experimentation quality would require significant onboarding for a Principal-level position.
strengths: Proven ability to architect and ship systems at scale (Dunnhumby handling millions of req/sec, direct mail platform processing millions annually)
Strong technical leadership with 10+ years at senior/staff level, mentoring others, and founding successful open-source projects
Modern engineering practices deeply embedded: TDD, CI/CD, code quality focus, and recent hands-on work with AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems despite these being core responsibilities
Missing expertise in metrics, telemetry infrastructure, and statistical analysis—required for 'high data aptitude' and growth measurement responsibilities
Career focused on diverse engineering domains (web, mobile, GIS, robotics) rather than growth/experimentation systems; no evidence of translating business KPIs into measurable engineering outcomes

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in experimentation systems and platforms
Proven ability to architect scalable systems at enterprise scale
Recent AI and developer tooling experience showing current technical relevance
